title: Add CustomerService.count_by_status for dashboards
description: Add a new method count_by_status(tenant_id: int) -> Dict[CustomerStatus, int] on CustomerService. It returns the count of customers in the given tenant grouped by CustomerStatus enum. Must filter by tenant_id (tenant_id<=0 returns empty dict for safety, matching existing tenant-isolation pattern). Use the CustomerStatus enum keys, not strings.
acceptance: 1) CustomerService.count_by_status(tenant_id) exists and returns Dict[CustomerStatus, int]. 2) count returned for each status equals the number of customers with that status for that tenant. 3) Unit test in tests/unit/test_customer_service.py creates 3 customers across 2 tenants with mixed statuses, asserts counts are correct per tenant, and asserts tenant_id=0 returns {}. 4) Full tests/unit suite still passes.
implementation_commit_msg: feat(customer): add count_by_status method for dashboard use
